briefdescription.para: Per-SIMD TU dispatch template for fast scan.

detaileddescription.para:
This header is included once per SIMD TU with THE_LEVEL_TO_DISPATCH set to the desired SIMDLevel. It provides:
ScannerMixIn: wraps a handler + calls kernel at the TU's SIMD level
make_fast_scan_scanner_impl<SL>: factory specialization
Usage (in a per-SIMD .cpp file): #define THE_LEVEL_TO_DISPATCH SIMDLevel::AVX2 #include <faiss/impl/fast_scan/dispatching.h>

Kernel helpers come from accumulate_loops.h (search_1 multi-BB path and QBS 256-bit path). The QBS helpers use pq4_kernel_qbs_256 only because decompose_qbs.h pulls in 512-bit types that fail with SINGLE_SIMD_LEVEL=NONE in DD mode.
